items.aria: Editor content;Press Alt+F1 for Accessibility Options.
items.className: inputarea monaco-mouse-cursor-text
items.value:
//@version=5
strategy("MCP Test SMA Strategy", overlay=true)

fast = ta.sma(close, 10)
slow = ta.sma(close, 20)

longCondition = ta.crossover(fast, slow)
exitCondition = ta.crossunder(fast, slow)

if longCondition
